title: V-Butt Weld Fabrication Drawing
engineering_intent: Drafted 2D manufacturing drawing for a V-butt welded joint. Applied specific weld symbols and geometric tolerances to account for thermal distortion during fabrication.

title: Four-Bar Chain Kinematics
engineering_intent: Defined precise kinematic mates to simulate full range of motion. Analyzed the linkage path to prevent physical interference during cyclic loading.

title: Thermal Heat Flux Analysis
engineering_intent: Developed a custom script to plot the transient heat transfer of a Peltier module. Utilized matrix operations to model thermal resistance across multiple boundary layers.
